title: comet-ml/opik
abstract: comet-ml/opik is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and it handles the execution. Debug, evaluate, and monitor your L...
abstract_zh: 别再为写周报头疼了，试试**opik**吧！它能自动抓取数据、整理要点，简直比你的加班时间还宝贵。写报告时它帮你搜集资料，调Bug时它让你省心不少。用上这个小帮手，效率嗖嗖升，赶紧试试吧！
